scope: Confirm technical stack and deployment environment for ERIS MVP

confirmed_stack.database: PostgreSQL with pgvector image in docker-compose

repo_layout_alignment: app/ contains FastAPI backend APIs, services, models, and core settings.
admin/ contains the Next.js operation admin.
config/ contains signed business and approval configuration.
docs/product/business-flow.html is the business-flow task source of truth.
docker-compose.yml defines PostgreSQL, Redis, API, and observability services.

final_confirmation.confirmation_text: H-01, H-02, H-05, H-07, H-08, H-09, H-10, H-11 all confirmed approved.

acceptance: Repository layout is consistent with REPO_LAYOUT.
